channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1865] sanity test 71 hangs
item.description:
The test seems to hang and the OSS's console show below crash

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 71: Running dbench on lustre (don't segment fault) ====== 22:18:21 (1347081501)
skb_over_panic: text:ffffffffa0109de1 len:1514 put:1514 head:(null) data:(null) tail:0x5ea end:0x0 dev:<NULL>
BUG: scheduling while atomic: swapper/0/0x10000100
Modules linked in: lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core zfs(P)(U) zcommon(P)(U) znvpair(P)(U) zavl(P)(U) zunicode(P)(U) spl(U) zlib_deflate microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]
CPU 0
Modules linked in: lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core zfs(P)(U) zcommon(P)(U) znvpair(P)(U) zavl(P)(U) zunicode(P)(U) spl(U) zlib_deflate microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]

Pid: 0, comm: swapper Tainted: P --------------- 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.g293c36b.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
RIP: 0010:[<ffffffff810387cb>] [<ffffffff810387cb>] native_safe_halt+0xb/0x10
RSP: 0018:ffffffff81a01ec8 EFLAGS: 00000246
RAX: 0000000000000000 RBX: ffffffff81a01ec8 RCX: 0000000000000000
RDX: 0000000000000000 RSI: 0000000000000001 RDI: ffffffff81dda228
RBP: ffffffff8100ba4e R08: 0000000000000000 R09: 0000000000000000

R13: ffffffff81a01e58 R14: ffffffff81012b89 R15: ffffffff81a01e28

CR2: 00007f81685bc000 CR3: 000000007d34d000 CR4: 00000000000006f0

DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000ffff0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400

ffffffff81a01ee8 ffffffff810149cd ffffffff81a01fd8 ffffffff81c017c0

[<ffffffff81009e06>] ? cpu_idle+0xb6/0x110
[<ffffffff814e47aa>] ? rest_init+0x7a/0x80

-----------[ cut here ]-----------
kernel BUG at net/core/skbuff.c:127!
invalid opcode: 0000 1 SMP
last sysfs file: /sys/devices/system/cpu/possible
CPU 0

Initializing cgroup subsys cpuset

Linux version 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.g293c36b.x86_64 (jenkins@builder-1-sde1-el6-x8664.lab.whamcloud.com) (gcc version 4.4.6 20120305 (Red Hat 4.4.6-4) (GCC) ) #1 SMP Tue Aug 28 14:50:57 PDT 2012

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This could be related to LU-1883.
